entries.claim_text: Automatic Prompt Optimization with "Gradient Descent" and Beam Search
entries.quoted_snippet: Automatic Prompt Optimization with

entries.claim_text: EMNLP 2023
entries.quoted_snippet: \usepackage{EMNLP2023}
EMNLP2023

entries.claim_text: Reid Pryzant, Dan Iter, Jerry Li, Yin Tat Lee, Chenguang Zhu, Michael Zeng (Microsoft Azure AI)
entries.quoted_snippet: Reid Pryzant, Dan Iter, Jerry Li, Yin Tat Lee, Chenguang Zhu, Michael Zeng

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/microsoft/LMOps/tree/main/prompt_optimization
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/microsoft/LMOps/tree/main/prompt_optimization

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: \usepackage{EMNLP2023}

entries.claim_text: prompt 至今仍靠人手以反覆試錯的方式寫成
entries.quoted_snippet: Writing prompts in natural language remains a manual trial-and-error process requiring significant human effort

entries.claim_text: 核心點子是把數值梯度下降「翻譯」成一場文字的蘇格拉底式對話
entries.quoted_snippet: mirroring the steps of gradient descent within a text-based Socratic dialogue

entries.claim_text: 每個任務隨機取 50 筆做開發、150 筆做測試
entries.quoted_snippet: For each task, we randomly sample 50 examples for development and 150 for test.

entries.claim_text: p^{*} = \arg\max_{p \in \mathcal{L}} \; m(p, \mathcal{D}_{te})
entries.quoted_snippet: argmax_{p\in \mathcal{L}}

entries.claim_text: 是任意度量函數（本文用 F1）
entries.quoted_snippet: all prompts $p$ are drawn from the space of coherent natural language

entries.claim_text: give {num_feedbacks} reasons why the prompt could
entries.quoted_snippet: give {num_feedbacks} reasons why the prompt could

entries.claim_text: Based on the above information, I wrote
entries.quoted_snippet: Based on the above information, I wrote
B_0 \leftarrow \{p_0\}

entries.claim_text: `Expand(p)` 才是把「文字梯度下降」落地的地方
entries.quoted_snippet: Evaluate prompt $p$ on minibatch $\mathcal{D}_{mini}$ and collect errors

entries.claim_text: 論文把這件事對應到 bandit 理論裡的 best-arm identification 問題
entries.quoted_snippet: the well-studied problem of best arm identification in bandit optimization

entries.claim_text: Q_t(p) + c \sqrt{\frac{\log t}{N_t(p)}}
entries.quoted_snippet: Q_t(p) + c \sqrt{\frac{\log t}{N_t(p)}}

entries.claim_text: $c$ 是探索係數（實驗全設 2.0）
entries.quoted_snippet: we set the exploration parameter $c$ to 2.0 for all experiments

entries.claim_text: n_t = \left\lceil \frac{1}{0.5 + \sum_{i=2}^{T} 1/i}
entries.quoted_snippet: n_t = \left \lceil{\frac{1}{0.5 + \sum_{i=2}^{T} 1 / i}

entries.claim_text: 理論上 Successive Rejects 對 best-arm identification 是可證明最優的，但論文的實測結果卻相反
entries.quoted_snippet: provably optimal for best arm identification

entries.claim_text: 初始 prompt $p_0$ 是工程師隨手寫的一句
entries.quoted_snippet: our initial prompts $p_0$ were written by professional Machine Learning engineers in one quick pass

entries.claim_text: minibatch 大小 $|\mathcal{D}_{mini}|=64$、beam 寬度
entries.quoted_snippet: minibatch size of $\vert \mathcal{D}_{mini} \vert = 64$, beam size $b=4$, and ran the algorithm for 6 optimization steps

entries.claim_text: 平均而言 ProTeGi 超出 MC 與 RL 各 3.9% 與 8.2%
entries.quoted_snippet: ProTeGi improved over the MC and RL baselines by a significant 3.9\% and 8.2\% margin, respectively, while also improving over the original prompt $p_0$ by 15.3\% and AutoGPT by 15.2\%
Beam (ProTeGi)    &    \textbf{0.85}      &   \textbf{0.67}    &  \textbf{0.88}  \\

entries.claim_text: 50-per-prompt 的 Jailbreak，UCB 0.85 對 SR 0.82、SH 0.80
entries.quoted_snippet: UCB   &   \textbf{0.83}                 &   \textbf{0.66}         & \textbf{0.85}               & 0.66         \\

entries.claim_text: GPT-4 在 Jailbreak 上最高（0.88）；Sarcasm 上 GPT-4 與 ChatGPT 並列最高（同為 0.86）
entries.quoted_snippet: GPT-4        & \textbf{0.86}   & \textbf{0.88}

entries.claim_text: RLHF 調過的模型大幅超越 GPT-3，對比之下 GPT-3 僅有 0.73／0.55
entries.quoted_snippet: The RLHF-tuned models dramatically outperform GPT-3, with GPT-4 offering the best performance

entries.claim_text: 原文在公式附近只明確定義了 $B$，公式裡的 $T$ 並未在該處給出定義
entries.quoted_snippet: where $B$ is the total query budget

entries.claim_text: 把最好的個案數字放進摘要標題、把平均值藏在正文
entries.quoted_snippet: improving over the original prompt $p_0$ by 15.3\%

entries.claim_text: 每個任務只用 150 筆測試、3 次試驗平均
entries.quoted_snippet: limited and preliminary case study

entries.claim_text: Jailbreak 正是作者自己提出工作定義、並自行建立的任務——論文明說「We define jailbreak attack as...」，這個 452 筆多語資料集帶有人工標註（human-annotated）的標籤（論文未交代標註者身分）
entries.quoted_snippet: This dataset has 452 multilingual examples and human-annotated jailbreak labels

entries.claim_text: 方法的真正新意是把「LLM 生成的批評」當成有方向的梯度
entries.quoted_snippet: rely on a task-specific or directionless local search over the space of prompts without meaningful semantic direction

entries.claim_text: 所有任務大約在第 3 步就達到高點
entries.quoted_snippet: all datasets peaked at around 3 steps

entries.claim_text: ProTeGi 雖然平均較好，變異卻可能更高（例如 Ethos 的 SE 0.003 對 MC 的 0.001）
entries.quoted_snippet: \multicolumn{1}{l|}{Ethos}     & \textbf{0.95}       & 0.003       & 0.94      & \textbf{0.001}      \\

entries.claim_text: 變異數表用與主結果不同的評估協定：每個候選只跑 6 次 query、每個變體重複 12 次試驗，回報 Accuracy 與 SE
entries.quoted_snippet: We conduct a larger-scale experiment using a budget of 6 queries per candidate, 12 replicates per variant in order calculate the standard error of the performance of the resulting top-ranked candidates.

entries.claim_text: Ethos 從第 3 步約 0.965 降到第 7 步約 0.942、Sarcasm 從第 3 步約 0.877 降到第 6 步約 0.857（肉眼讀圖近似）
entries.quoted_snippet: Test performance (F1) verses number of optimization steps

entries.claim_text: 作者在 Limitations 明說，即使查詢預算不大，一次最佳化因大量 API 呼叫（含每輪 beam 候選的完整評估）常會跑超過 1 小時
entries.quoted_snippet: which can push the runtime of the optimization program past 1 hour even with a small query budget

entries.claim_text: 論文把這些數字統稱為「margin」，並未在該段說明是絕對百分點還是相對百分比
entries.quoted_snippet: 3.9\% and 8.2\% margin, respectively

entries.claim_text: ProTeGi 的一次最佳化步驟總覽
entries.quoted_snippet: Overview of the proposed Prompt Optimization with Textual Gradients (ProTeGi)

entries.claim_text: 模仿梯度下降的文字對話樹
entries.quoted_snippet: The text dialogue tree we use to mimic gradient descent and overcome the discrete optimization barrier

entries.claim_text: 四個任務上 F1 對每個候選的評估預算的曲線
entries.quoted_snippet: Test performance (F1) vs API query budget per prompt candidate

entries.claim_text: 四個任務上 F1 對最佳化步數的學習曲線
entries.quoted_snippet: Test performance (F1) verses number of optimization steps
